arts.ttl: Thiago Motta: “It’ll be an open game against Leipzig, we are two similar teams.”
arts.sum: Ahead of Juventus’ upcoming Champions League match against RB Leipzig, head coach Thiago Motta shared his thoughts on the challenge awaiting his team. Speaking to Sky Sport, Motta emphasized the open nature of the contest and the similarities between the two sides. “Leipzig lost while playing well and showing important football against Atletico Madrid,” Motta began. “I think it will be an open match. They will press high with the intention to attack. It will be a different squad to face compared to those we’ve seen so far.” The Juventus manager went on to discuss his team’s approach: “We will The post Thiago Motta: “It’ll be an open game against Leipzig, we are two similar teams.” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Juventus eye transfer targets in Leipzig clash: 4 players under Giuntoli’s scrutiny
arts.sum: As Juventus prepares to face RB Leipzig in their second Champions League group stage match, the game takes on added significance beyond the pitch. While Thiago Motta’s side will be looking to build on their 3-1 victory over PSV Eindhoven, Calciomercato report that Juventus Sporting Director Cristiano Giuntoli will have his attention focused on several Leipzig players who have been on the club’s radar. Sesko: The Most Talked-About Target Benjamin Sesko stands out as the most discussed potential target. Juventus had shown interest in the Slovenian striker earlier this summer when Dusan Vlahovic’s future was uncertain. arts.ttl: Benjamin Sesko: “Juventus have an Impressive defence. Me joining Milan in the summer?…..”
arts.sum: RB Leipzig’s Slovenian striker Benjamin Sesko praised Juve’s defence ahead of their Champions League match on Wednesday. Speaking in a recent interview with La Gazzetta dello Sport (via Calciomercato), Sesko shared his thoughts on his career development, the upcoming match against Juventus, and his future prospects. Reflecting on his journey, Sesko said, “Here, as well as in Salzburg, I have a lot of space and time to make mistakes.
